questions: What is the patient's weight in kilograms?
Does the patient have any known allergies to adrenaline or bisulphites? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's systolic blood pressure in mmHg?
What is the patient's heart rate in beats per minute?
Is the patient experiencing respiratory distress (dyspnea, wheeze, stridor, low PEF, hypoxemia)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing reduced blood pressure (systolic BP < 90 mmHg or >30% decrease) or end-organ dysfunction (hypotonia, collapse, syncope, incontinence)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing persistent GI symptoms? (Yes/No)
Was the anaphylaxis triggered by an allergen extract or hymenoptera sting into an extremity? (Yes/No)
Is the patient in shock (e.g., hypotension, altered mental status)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing severe laryngeal obstruction, bronchospasm, or coma? (Yes/No)
Did the patient respond to the initial IM adrenaline dose? (Yes/No)
Is the only manifestation urticaria or angioedema? (Yes/No)
